task: Analyze Market A as a potential opportunity. Research: 1) Current market size and growth rate, 2) Key players and market share, 3) Barriers to entry, 4) Recent developments and news. Present data in a clear table format with an overall assessment (Strong/Moderate/Weak). Keep under 600 words.

Analyze Market B as a potential opportunity. Research: 1) Current market size and growth rate, 2) Key players and market share, 3) Barriers to entry, 4) Recent developments and news. Present data in a clear table format with an overall assessment (Strong/Moderate/Weak). Keep under 600 words.

Compare the analyses of Market A and Market B. Evaluate: 1) Relative opportunity size, 2) Risk-adjusted attractiveness, 3) Resource requirements, 4) Time to impact. Provide a ranked recommendation with rationale. Keep under 600 words.

Based on all previous analyses, create a prioritized execution plan. Include: 1) Recommended market entry sequence, 2) Key milestones and timeline, 3) Resource allocation, 4) Risk mitigation steps. Format as an actionable roadmap. Keep under 600 words.
